html:html > body > div:text.en: Connect to your local WiFi here!
html:html > body > div:text.translation: 在此连接您的本地 WiFi！

html:html > body > div > h3:text.en: A versatile tool for controlling LEDs
html:html > body > div > h3:text.translation: 一款多功能 LED 控制工具

html:html > body > div > h4:text.translation: 访问 wled.me 了解更多信息

html:html > body > div > i:text.en: Just trying this out in AP mode?
html:html > body > div > i:text.translation: 只是想在 AP 模式下试试？

html:html > body > b:text.en: Akemi does not know where you are headed...
html:html > body > b:text.translation: Akemi 不知道你要去哪里...

html:div#cv:text.translation: 正在加载 WLED 界面...

html:html > body > noscript > div:text.translation: 抱歉，WLED 界面需要 JavaScript！

html:div#rover:text.en:
To use built-in effects, use an override button below.
	You can return to realtime mode by pressing the star in the top left corner.
html:div#rover:text.translation:
要使用内置特效，请使用下方的覆盖按钮。
	按左上角的星标可返回实时模式。

html:div#rover > span:text.en: For best performance, it is recommended to turn off the streaming source when not in use.
html:div#rover > span:text.translation: 为获得最佳性能，建议在不使用时关闭流媒体源。

html:html > body:text.en: No usermod custom web page set.
html:html > body:text.translation: 未设置用户模块自定义网页。

AP SSID（留空则不启用 AP）: 
		隐藏 AP 名称: 
		AP 密码（留空则开放）:

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(6):te.en:
Force 802.11g mode (ESP8266 only): 
		Disable WiFi sleep:
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(6):te.translation:
强制 802.11g 模式（仅 ESP8266）: 
		禁用 WiFi 休眠:

html:div#NoESPNOW > i:text.en: This firmware build does not include ESP-NOW support.
html:div#NoESPNOW > i:text.translation: 此固件构建不包含 ESP-NOW 支持。

html:div#ESPNOW > i:text.en:
Listen for events over ESP-NOW
			Keep disabled if not using a remote or ESP-NOW sync, increases power consumption.
html:div#ESPNOW > i:text.translation:
通过 ESP-NOW 监听事件
					如果不使用遥控器或 ESP-NOW 同步，请保持禁用，否则会增加功耗。

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(6) >.en:
Disabling WiFi sleep increases power consumption
		but can help with connectivity issues and sync.
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(6) >.translation:
禁用 WiFi 休眠会增加功耗
		但有助于解决连接问题和同步。

html:div#tx > i:text.en: WARNING: Modifying TX power may render device unreachable.
html:div#tx > i:text.translation: 警告：修改发射功率可能导致设备无法访问。

html:div#rlc:text.en:
Last device seen: 

				Linked MACs (10 max):
html:div#rlc:text.translation:
最后发现的设备: 

				已链接 MAC（最多 10 个）:

html:div#mxGen:text.en:
Panel dimensions (WxH):  x 
			Horizontal panels: 
			Vertical panels: 
			1 panel: 
			Orientation: 
			Serpentine:
html:div#mxGen:text.translation:
面板尺寸 (宽x高):  x 
			水平面板数: 
			垂直面板数: 
			第1个面板: 
			方向: 
			蛇形排列:

html:div#mxGen > i:text.en:
Pressing Populate will create LED panel layout with pre-arranged matrix.Values above  affect final layout.
				WARNING: You may need to update each panel parameters after they are generated.

html:div#mpdiv > div:nth-of-type(2) > i:.en:
A matrix is made of 1 or more physical LED panels.
		Each panel can be of different size and/or have different LED orientation and/or starting point and/or layout.

html:div#mpdiv > div:nth-of-type(5) > i:.en:
Note: Gap file is a  file containing an array with number of elements equal to the matrix size.
			A value of -1 means that pixel at that position is missing, a value of 0 means never paint that pixel, and 1 means regular pixel.

html:div#abl > i:text.en:
Automatically limits brightness to stay close to the limit.
				Keep at <1A if powering LEDs directly from the ESP 5V pin!
				If using multiple outputs it is recommended to use per-output limiter.
				Analog (PWM) and virtual LEDs cannot use automatic brightness limiter.
html:div#abl > i:text.translation:
自动限制亮度以保持在限制范围内。
				如果直接从 ESP 5V 引脚供电，保持在 <1A 以下！
				使用多个输出时建议使用单输出限制器。
				模拟（PWM）和虚拟 LED 不能使用自动亮度限制。

html:div#ppldis > i:text.en:
Make sure you enter correct value for each LED output.
				If using multiple outputs with only one PSU, distribute its power proportionally amongst outputs.

html:div#ampwarning:text.en:
⚠ Your power supply provides high current.
				To improve the safety of your setup,
				please use thick cables,
				multiple power injection points and a fuse!

html:div#ledwarning:text.en:
⚠ You might run into stability or lag issues.
			Use less than  for the best experience!

html:div#wc:text.en:
Global override for Auto-calculate white:
			

			Calculate CCT from RGB: 
			CCT IC used (Athom 15W): 
			CCT blending (±100%):  %

html:div#wc > small:text.en: Positive: additive blend, Negative: exclusive blend

html:div#wc > i:text.en: Set to 0 when using 2-wire (reverse polarity) CCT strips

html:form#form_s:text.en:
For best results, only use one of these services at a time.
(alternatively, connect a second ESP to them and use the UDP sync)

为获得最佳效果，一次只使用其中一个服务。
（或者，将第二个 ESP 连接到它们并使用 UDP 同步）

html:div#dmxInputOff > i:text.en: This firmware build does not include DMX Input support.
html:div#dmxInputOff > i:text.translation: 此固件构建不包含 DMX 输入支持。

html:div#dmxOnOffOutput > i:text.en: This firmware build does not include DMX output support.
html:div#dmxOnOffOutput > i:text.translation: 此固件构建不包含 DMX 输出支持。

html:div#NoAlexa > i:text.en: This firmware build does not include Alexa support.
html:div#NoAlexa > i:text.translation: 此固件构建不包含 Alexa 支持。

html:div#Alexa:text.en:
Emulate Alexa device: 
Alexa invocation name: 
Also emulate devices to call the first  presets
html:div#Alexa:text.translation:
模拟 Alexa 设备: 
Alexa 调用名称: 
同时模拟设备以调用前  个预设

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(10) >.en:
MQTT and Hue sync connect to external hosts!
This may impact the responsiveness of WLED.
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(10) >.translation:
MQTT 和 Hue 同步会连接到外部主机!
这可能会影响 WLED 的响应速度。

html:div#NoMQTT > i:text.en: This firmware build does not include MQTT support.
html:div#NoMQTT > i:text.translation: 此固件构建不包含 MQTT 支持。

html:div#MQTT:text.en:
Enable MQTT:

html:div#MQTT > b:text.en:
The MQTT credentials are sent over an unsecured connection.
Never use the MQTT password for another service!
html:div#MQTT > b:text.translation:
MQTT 凭据通过不安全的连接发送。
切勿将 MQTT 密码用于其他服务!

html:div#NoHue > em:text.en: This firmware build does not include Philips Hue support.
html:div#NoHue > em:text.translation: 此固件构建不包含 Philips Hue 支持。

html:div#Hue:text.en:
Poll Hue light  every  ms: 
Then, receive  On/Off,  Brightness, and  Color
Hue Bridge IP:
 .
 .
 .


(when first connecting)

html:div#Hue:text.translation:
轮询 Hue 灯  每  ms: 
然后接收  开/关,  亮度, 和  颜色
Hue 桥接器 IP:
 .
 .
 .


（首次连接时）
Hue 状态:

html:div#Hue > i:text.en: You can find the bridge IP and the light number in the 'About' section of the hue app.
html:div#Hue > i:text.translation: 您可以在 Hue 应用的"关于"部分找到桥接器 IP 和灯号。

html:div#Hue > b:text.en: Press the pushlink button on the bridge, after that save this page!
html:div#Hue > b:text.translation: 按下桥接器上的链接按钮，然后保存此页面!

html:div#NoSerial > em:text.en: This firmware build does not support Serial interface.
html:div#NoSerial > em:text.translation: 此固件构建不支持串口接口。

html:div#Serial > i:text.en: Keep at 115200 to use Improv. Some boards may not support high rates.
html:div#Serial > i:text.translation: 保持 115200 以使用 Improv。部分主板可能不支持高速率。

html:form#form_s > div > h2:text.translation: 请输入设置 PIN 码

html:form#form_s > i:nth-of-type(1):text.en:
Presets can be used as macros for both JSON and HTTP API commands.
	Enter the preset ID below.
html:form#form_s > i:nth-of-type(1):text.translation:
预设可用作 JSON 和 HTTP API 命令的宏。
	在下方输入预设 ID。

html:form#form_s > i:nth-of-type(2):text.en: Use 0 for the default action instead of a preset
html:form#form_s > i:nth-of-type(2):text.translation: 使用 0 表示默认操作而非预设

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.en: (opens new tab, only works in browser)
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.translation: (打开新标签页，仅在浏览器中有效)

html:div#cac:text.en:
First LED:  Last LED: 
			12h LED: 
			Show 5min marks: 
			Seconds (as trail): 
			Show clock overlay only if all LEDs are solid black:
html:div#cac:text.translation:
首个 LED:  末个 LED: 
			12点位 LED: 
			显示 5 分钟刻度: 
			秒针 (拖尾): 
			仅在所有 LED 为纯黑时显示时钟叠加:

html:form#form_s > br:nth-of-type(5) > b.en:
Spacing between start channels:  [  ]


DMX fixtures start LED:
html:form#form_s > br:nth-of-type(5) > b.translation:
起始通道间距： [  ]


DMX 灯具起始 LED：

html:div#gapwarning:text.en: WARNING: Channel gap is lower than channels per fixture.
html:div#gapwarning:text.translation: 警告：通道间距小于每灯具通道数。

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.en: Settings on this page are only changeable if OTA lock is disabled!
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.translation: 只有在禁用 OTA 锁定后才能更改此页面上的设置!

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.en: ⚠ Unencrypted transmission. Be prudent when selecting PIN, do NOT use your banking, door, SIM, etc. pin!
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.translation: ⚠ 未加密传输。选择 PIN 码时请谨慎，不要使用银行卡、门禁、SIM 卡等 PIN 码!

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.en: Disable OTA when not in use, otherwise an attacker can reflash device software!
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.translation: 不使用时请禁用 OTA，否则攻击者可以重新刷写设备固件!

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.en: ⚠ Unencrypted transmission. An attacker on the same network can intercept form data!
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(2) >.translation: ⚠ 未加密传输。同一网络上的攻击者可以截获表单数据!

html:div#OTA:text.en: Only allow update from same network/WiFi:
html:div#OTA:text.translation: 仅允许同一网络/WiFi 更新:

html:div#OTA > i:text.en:
⚠ If you are using multiple VLANs (i.e. IoT or guest network) either set PIN or disable this option.
			Disabling this option will make your device less secure.
html:div#OTA > i:text.translation:
⚠ 如果使用多个 VLAN（如 IoT 或访客网络），请设置 PIN 码或禁用此选项。
			禁用此选项会降低设备安全性。

html:div#backup > div:nth-of-type(1):tex.en:
⚠ Restoring presets/configuration will OVERWRITE your current presets/configuration.
		Incorrect upload or configuration may require a factory reset or re-flashing of your ESP.
		For security reasons, passwords are not backed up.
html:div#backup > div:nth-of-type(1):tex.translation:
⚠ 恢复预设/配置将覆盖当前的预设/配置。
		错误的上传或配置可能需要恢复出厂设置或重新刷写 ESP。
		出于安全考虑，密码不会被备份。

html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(3) >.en:
The following UI customization settings are unique both to the WLED device and this browser.
		You will need to set them again if using a different browser, device or WLED IP address.
		Refresh the main UI to apply changes.
html:form#form_s > div:nth-of-type(3) >.translation:
以下界面自定义设置同时关联WLED设备和当前浏览器。
		使用不同浏览器、设备或WLED IP地址时需要重新设置。
		刷新主界面以应用更改。

html:div#bootupd > form:text.en: Only upload verified ESP32 bootloader files!
html:div#bootupd > form:text.translation: 仅上传经过验证的 ESP32 引导加载程序文件!

html:div#Noupd:text.en: Please do not close or refresh the page :)
html:div#Noupd:text.translation: 请不要关闭或刷新页面 :)
